title: Using decimals in automations with number columns
excerpt:

posts.author: adgrubbs (Amy G)
posts.cookedHtml:
I’m working on automation where I’d like a status to change is a number in a number column is less than .50.

We have decimals in the entries in the numbers column, but I can’t seem to put a decimal in the automation to catch numbers less than a decimal (ex: <.749).
